entities.name: PLANT VIRUSES
entities.description: Viruses that infect plants and are the target of diagnosis and detection methods.

entities.name: ICRISAT MANDATE CROPS
entities.description: Crops that are part of the research mandate of ICRISAT and are subject to virus disease detection.

entities.name: VIRUS DISEASES
entities.description: Pathological conditions in plants caused by viral infections.

entities.name: ELISA
entities.description: A protein-based diagnostic technique used for the detection of plant viruses.

entities.name: WESTERN IMMUNOBLOTTING
entities.description: A protein-based diagnostic technique used for the detection of plant viruses.

entities.name: PCR
entities.description: A nucleic acid-based diagnostic technique used for the detection of plant viruses.

entities.name: RT-PCR
entities.description: A nucleic acid-based diagnostic technique used for the detection of plant viruses.

entities.name: DOT-BLOT HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: A nucleic acid-based diagnostic technique used for the detection of plant viruses.

entities.name: PLANT-VIRUS VECTOR INTERACTIONS
entities.description: The study of the biological interactions between plants, viruses, and their vectors.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, which defines the mandate crops.
